name: Rally Racing VR: Xtreme Speed Challenge

reviews.review_description:
I've probably got every quest racing game. This has potential to be at the very top, with more features coming I hope: Camera angles, ghost time attack, improved graphics, reset button for crashes. Also, being able to adjust the motion sickness would be good.

Thanks again Devs, please keep up the updates. I already love this game.

reviews.review_title: A good rally arcade racer with potential
reviews.review_description: This is an update to my negative review regarding the lack of thumbstick controls. The developer has addressed the criticism and has finally added physical car controls. Now you can finally maneuver the cars precisely across the virtual gravel track without constantly ending up in the ditch. Unfortunately, there are currently only 4 tracks to drive on, but they are all well-made. The last one with the forest, in particular, turned out extremely well. Better graphics for Quest 3 would be nice, since everything still looks a bit low-poly. A career mode with championships is also a must to ensure long-term fun. And the tracks should be based on real-world locations. I’m giving the game 4 stars because the controls are now really good and the game has potential. A fifth star because the developer responds to criticism.

developer_response.body: Thank you so much for updating your review! We are thrilled to hear that the new thumbstick controls have improved your experience on the track. Listening to player feedback is a priority for us, so we’re glad we could get that right for you. We also hear you loud and clear on the need for more content—we are currently looking into adding more tracks, cars, and a deeper championship mode. Stay tuned for future updates, and thanks for racing with us!

reviews.review_description: Great game need more levels definitely more cars Lee's five or six more cars added or trucks mini coopers rally trucks and need more decent amount of levels least by five or six if not four level with tunnels street racing thunderstorm mud flickering on the window in the wind swiper wipes it off mud kicking off the tires from racing other people Little bit more wider tracks for multiplayer racing keep up the good work looking forward to seeing more updates to this game and more customization like changing your wheels to steer better on different gravel dirt or street and more things going on in environment it's too empty and too flat knees polished they need a level will I go into mountains amount in cave a street cave couple of jumps and something when you crash into a ditch you get stuck all your car run up a wall on the fall to the side you get stuck and when it resets itself and send you all the way back to the beginning please fix it and sometimes I crash too hard the whole screen turns white The overall the game is fun the speed is fun I love racing against other drivers probably need more drivers and then tracks expand it more to fit all the cars on there to race against each other I had lots of fun playing this game drifting sliding just need some jumps more cars more tracks like a swap track driving through a swamp but frogs hidden mud puddles swamp puddles One of my second favorite racing games on the quest can't wait to see more updates to this game it's turned out great the evening time need to have some more fog can't wait to see what y'all come up next for the game
why do devs keep trying to sell very bad games under the disguise of " early access? And why so difficult or almost impossible to get refunds?

developer_response.body:
Hi NowHere77, thanks for the feedback.

Since your last try, we’ve made big improvements to core gameplay — smoother controls, better stability, improved performance, and many bug fixes. We’ve also added new content like environments, cars, weather effects, and a new multiplayer (ghost racing) mode.

Refunds are handled by the platform store policies (), so we don’t have control over that process.

If you’re open to it, please try the latest version again — we think you’ll notice a big difference in how it feels to play.

Thanks again for helping us improve the game.

reviews.review_description: Game is fine but sometimes my screen goes white in the snowy map and the steering is janky but other than that the game is really good
